entries.@emnapi/runtime: Temporary semver-compatible dedupe override to collapse wasm-runtime consumers onto 1.9.0 while sharp-related and resolver transitive ranges catch up.
entries.flatted: Keeps flat-cache on a patched transitive release while upstream ranges still allow older versions.
entries.minimatch: Applies a minimum safe floor for legacy transitive consumers that still request older vulnerable 3.x releases.
entries.picomatch: Applies a minimum safe floor for tooling transitive consumers while upstream ranges still allow older 4.x releases.
entries.smol-toml: Keeps Knip's TOML parser dependency on a patched minimum release.
entries.yaml: Applies a minimum safe floor for CLI and tooling consumers such as Knip and lint-staged.

scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:matrix: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync('bunx playwright test', { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env: { ...process.env, PLAYWRIGHT_FULL_MATRIX: '1' } }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test:e2e:labs: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync('bunx playwright test', { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env: { ...process.env, PLAYWRIGHT_FULL_MATRIX: '1', PLAYWRIGHT_ONLY_LABS: '1' } }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test:e2e:local-prod: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync('bunx playwright test', { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env: { ...process.env, PLAYWRIGHT_LOCAL_PRODUCTION: '1' } }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test:e2e:user:real: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync('bunx playwright test tests/e2e/user/user.spec.ts tests/e2e/user/user-page-editor-save.spec.ts --project=chromium --grep @real-handlers', { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env: { ...process.env, PLAYWRIGHT_REAL_USER_E2E: '1', TRUSTED_CLIENT_IP_HEADERS: 'x-playwright-client-ip' } }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test:e2e:user:real:local-prod: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync('bunx playwright test tests/e2e/user/user.spec.ts tests/e2e/user/user-page-editor-save.spec.ts --project=chromium --grep @real-handlers', { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env: { ...process.env, PLAYWRIGHT_REAL_USER_E2E: '1', PLAYWRIGHT_LOCAL_PRODUCTION: '1', TRUSTED_CLIENT_IP_HEADERS: 'x-playwright-client-ip' } }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test:e2e:deployed-smoke: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const rawBaseUrl = process.env.PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL?.trim(); if (!rawBaseUrl) { console.error('PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL is required for deployed smoke runs.'); process.exit(1); } let parsed; try { parsed = new URL(rawBaseUrl); } catch { console.error('PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL must be a valid absolute http(s) URL: ' + rawBaseUrl); process.exit(1); } const host = parsed.hostname.toLowerCase(); const isTrustedHost = host === 'anicards.alpha49.com' || /^anicards(?:-[a-z0-9-]+)+\.vercel\.app$/.test(host); if (!/^https?:$/.test(parsed.protocol) || parsed.username || parsed.password || !isTrustedHost) { console.error('PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL must target the AniCards production host or an AniCards Vercel preview host: ' + rawBaseUrl); process.exit(1); } const result = spawnSync('bunx playwright test tests/e2e/smoke/unmocked-app-shell.spec.ts --project=chromium', { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env: { ...process.env, PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL: parsed.origin } }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
